title: Evaluating using Mock Tool Calls to Quarantine Untrusted Prompt Inputs
summary: Evaluating using Mock Tool Calls to Quarantine Untrusted Prompt Inputs
whyItMatters: This is a small study that explores using tool calls to wrap untrusted parts of prompts. OpenAI's model spec considers tool results the least trusted kind of input. If tool-wrapping helped, it would be an easy way to improve robustness while using existing APIs models already support. In 3 tested tasks it didn't seem to broadly help, and in some cases made…
